      38             : NAMESPACE_LERC_START
      39             : 
      40             : /**   Lerc2 v1
      41             :  *
      42             :  *    -- allow for lossless compression of all common data types
      43             :  *    -- avoid data type conversions and copies
      44             :  *    -- optimized compression for segmented rasters (10-15x lossless)
      45             :  *    -- micro block is 8x8 fixed, only gets doubled to 16x16 if bit rate < 1 bpp
      46             :  *    -- cnt is replaced by bit mask
      47             :  *    -- Lerc blob header has data range [min, max]
      48             :  *    -- harden consistency checks to detect if the byte blob has been tampered with
      49             :  *    -- drop support for big endian, this is legacy now
      50             :  *
      51             :  *    Lerc2 v2
      52             :  *
      53             :  *    -- add Huffman coding for better lossless compression of 8 bit data types Char, Byte
      54             :  *
      55             :  *    Lerc2 v3
      56             :  *
      57             :  *    -- add checksum for the entire byte blob, for more rigorous detection of compressed data corruption
      58             :  *    -- for the main bit stuffing routine, use an extra uint buffer for guaranteed memory alignment
      59             :  *    -- this also allows to drop the NumExtraBytesToAllocate functions
      60             :  *
      61             :  *    Lerc2 v4
      62             :  *
      63             :  *    -- allow array per pixel, nDim values per pixel. Such as RGB, complex number, or larger arrays per pixel
      64             :  *    -- extend Huffman coding for 8 bit data types from delta only to trying both delta and orig
      65             :  *    -- for integer data types, allow to drop bit planes containing only random noise
      66             :  *
      67             :  */
      68             : 
      69             : class Lerc2
      70             : {
      71             : public:
      72             :   Lerc2();
      73             :   Lerc2(int nDim, int nCols, int nRows, const Byte* pMaskBits = nullptr);    // valid / invalid bits as byte array
      74        6550 :   virtual ~Lerc2()  {}
      75             : 
      76             :   bool SetEncoderToOldVersion(int version);    // call this to encode compatible to an old decoder
      77             : 
      78             :   bool Set(int nDim, int nCols, int nRows, const Byte* pMaskBits = nullptr);
      79             : 
      80             :   template<class T>
      81             :   unsigned int ComputeNumBytesNeededToWrite(const T* arr, double maxZError, bool encodeMask);
      82             : 
      83             :   //static unsigned int MinNumBytesNeededToReadHeader();

      85             :   /// dst buffer already allocated;  byte ptr is moved like a file pointer
      86             :   template<class T>

      88             : 
      89             :   // data types supported by Lerc2
      90             :   enum DataType {DT_Char = 0, DT_Byte, DT_Short, DT_UShort, DT_Int, DT_UInt, DT_Float, DT_Double, DT_Undefined};

     111       10674 :     bool TryHuffman() const  { return version > 1 && (dt == DT_Byte || dt == DT_Char) && maxZError == 0.5; }
